---
title: "Constable’s Tower, or, The Times of Magna Charta, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘The Heir of Redclyffe’ ‘Under the Storm’ etc."
---

## Constable’s Tower, or, The Times of Magna Charta, The By Charlotte M. Yonge, author of ‘The Heir of Redclyffe’ ‘Under the Storm’ etc.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** October 1891
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book 8vo 214pp

**Publisher:** London: National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, Westminster New York: Thomas Whittaker, 2 & 3 Bible House.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
